creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

It's not possible at the moment until it's well tested, because it required to 
bring in the newer pixmap, cairo and possible other stuff. ahze already has 
patches available in freebsd-gnome@, search for it in archives. Right now, 
ahze is moving to different state and need to settle down so he won't be here 
for a bit while.
